## Summary

- What does this PR change?
- Why is this change needed?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] CI/CD

## Testing

- [ ] `make test` (desktop / Vitest)
- [ ] `make test-agents` (Elixir / ExUnit)
- [ ] Manually tested relevant flows

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed project conventions
- [ ] I updated docs when needed
- [ ] I did not include secrets or credentials
